channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: Hermes agent maker Nous Research in talks for new funding at $1.5B valuation
item.description: The company is raising at least $75 million, led by Robot, with significant participation from USV and other prominent investors.

item.title: 'We have not ruled this out': The water-based battery that could turn whole data centers into energy storage
item.description: A battery that's half water can't catch fire, which is why SuperDielectrics wants to bolt it to the server rack itself, absorbing AI power spikes from the one spot lithium-ion is banned from

item.title: The Best Movies to Stream This Month (July 2026)
item.description: Project Hail Mary, They Will Kill You, and The Long Walk are among the films deserving of your eyeballs this month.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Tuesday, July 14 (game #1632)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Tuesday, July 14 (game #1129)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Tuesday, July 14 (game #863)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Every MacBook getting macOS 27: How to try the public beta
item.description: The macOS 27 Golden Gate pubic beta has been released. See which Mac devices will support updates to Liquid Glass, Apple Intelligence, and the new Siri AI.

item.title: Please let this hot pink Pixel 11 leak be real
item.description: Bring on the magenta and peach.

item.title: Like photosynthesis in plants: This CPU uses solar power to 'run computations' without the need for batteries
item.description: Chip works just like a leaf, harvesting ambient light, sensing chemicals, and digitizing the results in one nanoscale stack requiring no battery, no charger, and no external power at all

item.title: Sam Neill Inspired a Generation of Scientists
item.description: The actor, who died at age 78 on Monday, embodied a passionate approach to research and positive masculinity in his role as paleontologist Alan Grant in the 1993 blockbuster Jurassic Park.

item.title: Quote of the day by Steve Jobs: 'The only problem with Microsoft is they just have no taste' — a potshot at a bitter rival
item.description: Apple and Microsoft's rivalry stretches back decades, with the Apple co-founder repeatedly undermining Bill Gates' company

item.title: A Dell laptop with 32GB of RAM and NVIDIA graphics is just $525
item.description: Save 72% on a refurbished Dell Precision workstation with 32GB of RAM, dedicated NVIDIA graphics, and Windows 11 Pro.

item.title: These 29 iPhones support iOS 27 and the public beta: Is yours on the list?
item.description: One of the biggest surprises of WWDC 2026 involved which iPhones will support iOS 27. See the full list.
